title: Extracting Names from a String
scenario: Write a prompt to extract names from a given string. The string may contain multiple names separated by commas or spaces. The output should be a list of extracted names.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the code adheres to JavaScript syntax and is correctly formatted.
Verify if the code meets the character limit and uses the correct language syntax.
Check if the code correctly extracts the names from the given string.
